events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: confined space gas meter readout interpretation, O₂ 19.0% - enter or not? OSHA 1910.146. OSHA 1910.146 defines acceptable oxygen levels as 19.5% to 23.5%. O₂ at 19.0% is below acceptable range, so entry is not permitted. This is a fail.
